description: Structural mapping of the Provider-Agnostic AI+Human Operating System based on Category Theory.
axioms: No_Meta_Only_Recursive: The prefix 'meta' is deprecated. Systems nest recursively.
Code_Is_Axiomatic: No 'skill' metadata is precise enough unless defined as code/structural nodes.
DB_Is_Truth: Git holds infrastructure engines. The graph database holds all logic, templates, and active state.
Multi_Path_DAGs: Execution explicitly rejects single-path CoT for Multi-path Directed Acyclic Graph reasoning.

Objects.name: AuthUser
Objects.description: The authenticated human operator represented as a graph node. The anchor for all personal context arrays.

Objects.name: AppAdmin
Objects.description: Operator capable of architecting AppTemplates within the database.

Objects.name: SuperAdmin
Objects.description: Infrastructure engineer managing Git and the base code engines, deploying mo:os.

Objects.name: AppTemplate
Objects.description: A pristine, read-only cluster of NodeContainers. Represents the logic payload of an application.

Objects.name: NodeContainer
Objects.description: The fundamental unit of reality in mo:os. Holds recursive graph data, tools, state context, and UI mapping pointers.

Objects.name: AgnosticModel
Objects.description: The LLM or underlying AI engine, stripped of provider-specific API constraints, treated purely as a graph transformation function.

Objects.name: SystemTool
Objects.description: A globally available foundational tool executed by the ToolServer.

Objects.name: UI_Lens
Objects.description: The frontend application (e.g., ffs6/xyflow). A Functor that simply projects the NodeContainer JSON into React components.

Objects.name: RuntimeSurface
Objects.description: A persisted runtime UI surface object (e.g., chrome sidepanel, tab, pip) linked to the root container and synchronized through morphisms.

Morphisms.name: OWNS
Morphisms.description: Grants full CRUD traversal rights. Ensures mathematical RBAC compliance.

Morphisms.name: CAN_HYDRATE
Morphisms.description: Allows a user to instantiate an AppTemplate into a localized NodeContainer.

Morphisms.name: PRE_FLIGHT_CONFIG
Morphisms.description: Structural mapping that occurs before the agnostic model call (e.g., hyperparameter setting, contextual prompt wrapping).

Morphisms.name: SYNC_ACTIVE_STATE
Morphisms.description: Continuous WebSocket projection of the hot RAM multi-path DAG graph into the user's view.

Morphisms.name: ADD_NODE_CONTAINER
Morphisms.description: An LLM output intent that inserts a new NodeContainer into the DAG.

Morphisms.name: LINK_NODES
Morphisms.description: An LLM output intent connecting two objects.

Morphisms.name: UPDATE_NODE_KERNEL
Morphisms.description: An LLM intent to mutate the internal data payload/properties of an existing NodeContainer.

Morphisms.name: DELETE_EDGE
Morphisms.description: An LLM intent to sever a relationship between two objects, altering the DAG topology.

Systems.name: RootContainer
Systems.description: The OS harness running the Main Loop.

Systems.name: MainLoop
Systems.description: Event-based execution cycle. Monitors the Active State Cache and fires Morphisms based on user/AI events.

Systems.name: RestingStateDB
Systems.description: The base graph database where collapsed, finalized DAG reasoning and user profiles are immutably stored.

Systems.name: ActiveStateCache
Systems.description: The fast, hot-loading RAM space where the LLM evaluates multiple logic paths dynamically before committing.
